# Steven Rantai Ponton - Website

Website profesional untuk CV. Lima Pilar Mulya - Spesialis Rantai Ponton & Excavator Amphibi di Surabaya.

## 🔗 Live Demo
Coming soon...

## 📦 Features
- ✅ Responsive design (Mobile, Tablet, Desktop)
- ✅ Product catalog dengan filter
- ✅ Portfolio gallery
- ✅ Contact form dengan WhatsApp integration
- ✅ SEO optimized (Google & Social Media)
- ✅ Fast loading (vanilla JS, no frameworks)

## 🚀 Quick Start

### Local Development
```bash
# Clone repository
git clone https://github.com/paranparanjare-bot/rantai-ponton-surabaya.git

# Navigate to directory
cd rantai-ponton-surabaya

# Start local server
python3 -m http.server 8080

# Open browser
http://localhost:8080
```

## 📁 Project Structure
```
rantai-ponton-surabaya/
├── index.html              # Main website
├── assets/
│   ├── css/main.css       # Styles
│   ├── js/
│   │   ├── data.js        # Editable data
│   │   └── main.js        # Functionality
│   └── images/            # All images
├── README.md
└── DEPLOYMENT.md
```

## 🎨 Customization

### Update Products
Edit `assets/js/data.js` - array `productsData`

### Update Contact Info
Edit `index.html` - section `#contact`

### Change Colors
Edit `assets/css/main.css` - `:root` variables

## 🌐 Deployment

### Free Hosting
- **Netlify**: Drag & drop deployment
- **Vercel**: GitHub integration
- **GitHub Pages**: Built-in hosting

### Traditional Hosting
Upload via FTP to `public_html/`
